new_str:
Archive: I know it looks very long, but trust me it’s not. Just need to read: - A. General Info - B. Event Flow - C. Task Allocation - Members: know your leader, groupmates, and your own tasks - Leaders: also read every task you oversee # A. General Info **Location:** SIM Campus **Event Date & Time:** - Pre-Event Day: Friday, 17 July 2026 @ 18:00 - 22:00 - Main Event Day 1: Friday, 24 July 2026 @ 09:00 - 22:00 - Main Event Day 2: Saturday, 25 July 2026 @ 09:00 - 18:00 **Total Number of Participants:** Up to 100 pax (groups of 3-4 participants) - SIM students - External participants are allowed to join, if they are teamed up with at least 1 SIM student --- # B. Event Flow ## Pre-Event Day (Friday, 17 July 2026) - **Venue**: LT B.5.05 - **Time:** - EXCO (Outgoing EXCO) Reporting Time: 5:30 PM - Crew Reporting Time: 5:40 PM - Registration Opens: 6:00 PM - Officially Starts: 6:30 PM - **Attire:** ITC T-shirt
**Timing** PIC Tasks
18:00 – 18:30 **Registration opens**
Rey, Helen Standby at registration counter
The rest Standby inside the venue as usher
18:30 – 22:00 Everyone Standby inside the venue as facilitator
Vanness Photographer
18:30 – 19:00 **Hackathon Brief and Challenge Statement Brief**
Winston and Samar Emcee for the brief (Slides Details)
19:00 – 22:00 **Microsoft AI Foundry Workshop**
Senthil Workshop speaker
Winston Facilitate QnA if there’s QnA session
## Main Event Day 1 (Friday, 24 July 2026) - **Venue:** - Opening Ceremony: A.1.20 - Hacking Rooms: B.5.12/B.5.13 and B.2.07/B.2.08 - Mentoring Room: SR B.4.08 and SR B.4.07 - Fringe Games: SR B.4.07 - **Time:** - Crew Reporting Time: 8:30 AM - Registration Opens: 9:30 AM - Opening Ceremony Starts: 10:30 AM - **Attire:** Black T-shirt (Keep ITC T-shirt for Day 2) ## Setup Todo {toggle="true"} ### Opening Venue @ A.1.20 - [ ] Bring all items from DR1 - [ ] Merch - [ ] Socks - [ ] NFC lanyard card (for participants & volunteers) - [ ] Mousepad - [ ] Totebag - [ ] For mentors - [ ] Plaque for Senthamil and Roger - [ ] 2 water bottle - [ ] 2 Paper & pen - [ ] For volunteers (locker clearing) - [ ] Albert’s items - [ ] Shravantiga’s items - [ ] Bring items from Locker - [ ] Tripod - [ ] cable extension - [ ] tape/blue tack - [ ] snacks/drinks - [ ] Open projector, music [sweet cafe](https://bit.ly/itcsong) - [ ] Put group 1-29 label - [ ] Setup registration table - [ ] Put group 1-15 and group 16-29 label - [ ] Setup tripod & yt stream ### Hacking Venues @ B.5.12/B.5.13 and B.2.07/B.2.08 (can be done during opening ceremony) - [ ] Check if the partition is open at hacking venues - [ ] Setup table - [ ] Write group 1-29 label - [ ] Put group 1-29 label - [ ] Setup cable extender - [ ] Open projector, music [sweet cafe](https://bit.ly/itcsong), slides with QR code to /guide page ## Telegram Announcements {toggle="true"} - [ ] Registrations are open @ 09:30 - [ ] Lunch is served @ 11:30 - [ ] Hacking starts (agenda, resources links/guide ) @ 12:00 - [ ] Mentoring is open @ 13:00 - [ ] Dinner is served @ 18:00 - [ ] Fringe games is open @ 18:00 - [ ] Thank you for coming, see you tomorrow (can code at home as well) @ 22:00
**Timing** **PIC** **Tasks**
09:30 – 10:30 **Registration @ A.1.20 ** **Registration**
Rey, Helen Standby at registration counter
Monica, Kimberly, Gerald, Desmond Distribute merch (tote bag, socks, mousepad, NFC lanyard)
Chris, Shisa, Yan Mei Standby inside the venue as usher
10:30 – 11:30 **Opening Ceremony @ A.1.20 **
Winston and Samar Emcee for the opening ceremony (Slides Details )
Hayun Photographer
11:30 – 12:00 **Lunch Served @ A.1.20 **
Shisa, Yan Mei, Gerald Distribute lunchbox
Karthik, Nitya Standby inside each hacking venue as usher
12:00 – 22:00 **HACKATHON STARTS @ B.5.12/B.5.13 and B.2.07/B.2.08**
Everyone available Standby inside each hacking venue as facilitators
Albert Photographer
13:00 – 15:00 **Group Mentoring Sessions @ SR B.4.08 and SR B.4.07**
Rey, Helen Standby at mentoring door, follow the pre-assigned slot schedule and call each group when it’s their turn
Nitya, Monica Standby inside mentoring venue as timekeeper
Sanju, Shravantiga Photographer
Fuku Handover TOA if they don’t join Day 2
18:00 **Dinner Served @ B.5.12/B.5.13 and B.2.07/B.2.08**
Gerald, Alex, Yan Mei, Nitya Distribute dinner bento
18:00 – 22:00 **Fringe Games @ SR B.4.07**
Karthik, Vicky, Moe Standby inside venue to facilitate fringe games (“Prompt Relay” Game Details )
22:00 **END OF DAY 1**
## Main Event Day 2 (Saturday, 25 July 2026) - **Venue: ** - **Hacking Venue: **B.5.12/B.5.13 and B.2.07/B.2.08 - **Workshop Venue:** A.1.20 (entire day booked) - **Time:** - **Crew Reporting Time:** 8:30 AM - **Check-in:** 9:00 AM - **Attire:** ITC T-shirt - **Judges flow: **Judges split into **two teams** of **two**. Each team stays in one venue until that room’s pitches are done, then moves to the next venue. ## Setup Todo {toggle="true"} ### Hacking Venues @ B.5.12/B.5.13 and B.2.07/B.2.08 - [ ] Check if the partition is open at hacking venues - [ ] Setup table (if they store the tables) - [ ] Put group 1-29 label - [ ] Setup cable extension - [ ] Setup projector - [ ] music [sweet cafe](https://bit.ly/itcsong), - [ ] hackxperience website countdown timer on the left - [ ] slides of: submission & judging criteria + QR code to /guide page + /submit page ### Workshop Venue @ A.1.20 - [ ] Put group 1-29 label - [ ] Bring all items from DR1 - Merch - Socks - NFC lanyard card (for participants & volunteers) - Mousepad - Totebag - For judges - Plaque for Senthamil and Roger - 2 water bottle - 2 Paper & pen - [ ] Open projector, music [sweet cafe](https://bit.ly/itcsong) - [ ] Setup tripod & yt stream - [ ] Setup registration table - [ ] Put group 1-15 and group 16-29 label
**Timing** **PIC** **Tasks**
09:00 – 10:00 **Check-in @ B.5.12/B.5.13 and B.2.07/B.2.08**
Rey, Helen Standby at check-in counter
09:00 – 12:00 **HACKING SESSION @ B.5.12/B.5.13 and B.2.07/B.2.08**
Everyone available Standby inside each hacking venue as facilitators
Hayun Photographer
12:00 **END OF HACKING SESSION**
12:00 – 13:00 **Lunch served (Buffet) @ B.2.07/B.2.08**
Michelle Arrange pitching order
Desmond, Ameer, Vanness, Kimberly Verify submissions, ensure every group has submitted correctly
Vicky Oversee buffet (only those with lanyard can eat)
Moe Distribute vegetarian lunchbox
Karthik Usher standby at B.5.12/B.5.13 direct everyone to go B.2.07/B.2.08
13:00 – 15:30 **Pitching @ B.5.12/B.5.13 and B.2.07/B.2.08 (Pitching + Project Showcase Flow)**
Alex, Stanley Standby inside the venue as IT Support for the judging website
Samar, Winston Standby inside the venue as timekeeper
Rey, Helen Standby outside the venue to call next group to standby
Chris Standby outside the venue, remind Puspak when it’s time to change venue
Albert Photographer
15:30 - 16:30 **Project Showcase Booth @ B.5.12/B.5.13 and B.2.07/B.2.08**
Vanness, Stanley Direct participants to re-arrange table seating for showcase
Hayun Remind next group that pitch to Puspak to standby
Alex Standby near Puspak as IT Support for the judging website + timekeeper
Kimberly, Ameer Set the projector to the leaderboard page
Moe, Vicky Standby as IT Support for the participant voting website
Sanju, Shravantiga Standby next to the voting ipad, cross-check their team ID & name
Hayun Photographer
Karthik, Chris Escort participants to the workshop room @ A.1.20
**Judge Deliberation @ DR1**
Desmond Standby as IT Support for the judging website
16:30 – 17:30 **Entrepreneurship Workshop @ A.1.20**
Puspak Workshop speaker
Winston, Stanley Standby in the venue as usher
Vanness, Albert, Samar Fill in winner announcement slides
Monica, Kimberly, Ameer Prepare winner certificates
Sanju, Shravantiga Photographer
17:30 – 18:00 **Closing Ceremony & Winner Announcement & Group Photo**
Winston and Samar Emcee for the closing ceremony (Slides Details )
Sanju, Shravantiga Photographer
18:00 – 18:30 **Venue Cleanup**
Everyone Venue cleanup
